business.type_label: youth sports & fitness facility (gym / leagues / camps)

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is checking a physical PLACE: hours of operation, address/directions, programs offered, and upcoming events are the decision content. No sold expertise (not trust), the program tiles document offerings not a proof-portfolio, and the offer is not pre-understood enough for quick-yes.

goal.one_action: get the visitor to join/enroll — either tap through to the gym's Linktree or contact a trainer/staff

structure.archetype_note: Sprawling WordPress facility site (~40 pages via dropdown nav): programs/leagues, camps, fitness, events, hours. Home is a hub linking out to promos, Linktree, and a contact form.

mapped.observed_as: Unlock Your Best Self This Fall – Join Our Gym Today!
OUR NORMAL HOURS OF OPERATION ARE
(portfolio grid) program tiles: basketball, bowling, camps, fitness center, flag football, flag rugby, soccer, volleyball

unmapped.observed: OUR NORMAL HOURS OF OPERATION ARE (dedicated hours table, its own page + homepage block)
unmapped.why_no_fit: No canonical section id for an opening-hours table; it is core PLACE decision content, not miscellaneous filler

unmapped.observed: Upcoming Events (community announcements: scholarship, Wall of Fame)
unmapped.why_no_fit: Non-ticketed community announcements repeated across pages; not testimonials/socialProof and not a dated ticketed schedule

design_style.none_fits_because: Raw capture recorded no fonts, colors, or dark/light signal; insufficient evidence to assign one of the six styles.

confidence.why: fetch_quality is full with clear multi-page structure; PLACE classification unambiguous. Minor goal ambiguity (Linktree redirect vs on-site contact form both act as primary), but does not affect engine.

gap_findings: Opening-hours table is central PLACE content but has no canonical section id (maps only to miscellaneous).
Primary hero CTA hands off to a Linktree link-aggregator — a redirect target the taxonomy has no dedicated capability for (treated as generic redirect).
Recurring non-ticketed community 'Upcoming Events' announcements are neither event-listings (ticketed) nor socialProof — no clean home.
Promo pages ('Membership Special', 'Personal Training Special') promise perks/pricing but show no prices — a place-offer with deferred pricing the pricing section cannot represent.
